title: Characteristics_of_nitric_oxide_formation_rates_in_turbulent_nonpremixed_jet_fla
text:

1.  **Mathematical Equations:**

*   a(C3H8 + kH2) + b(O2 + 3.76 N2) -> nC3H8 C3H8 + nO2 O2 + nCO CO + nCO2 CO2 + nH2O H2O + nN2 N2 + nNO NO     (Equation 1)

*  [COMP] = nCOMP / V

*   V = 82.06T
*   Re, 20,400; x/D = 20; r/D = 2.2;

2.  **Graphs/Charts:**

* NOx Formation Rates (mole/s) vs Time(s):
    *   Y Axis: NOx Formation Rates (moles/s), range 1E-12 to 1E-3
    *   X Axis: Time (s), range 0.00 to 0.06
    *   Curves:
        *   Wz
        *   <Wz>
        *   Wp
* Temperature (C) vs Time:
    * Y Axis: Temperature (C), range 0 to 2000
    * X Axis: Time (s), range 0 to 0.06

* Isocontours:
  * a) T(C) - Isocontours of mean temperature
   * Y Axis: Temperature (Celcius), range 0 to 1200
  * b) f - Isocontours of mean mixture fraction (locus of the stoichiometric mixture fraction, f = 0.06)
   * Y Axis: f, range 0 to 1.0
  * c) U(m/s) - Isocontours of mean axial velocity
   * Y Axis: U (m/s), range 0 to 20
  * d) (u"^2)^0.5 - Isocontours of rms of the axial velocity.
   * Y Axis: (u"squared") to the 1/2, range 0 to 5.00

*   k = 0.179 (Re = 20,400)
*   k = 0.246 (Re = 37,600)
*   Stoichiometric mixture fraction, f = 0.06

title: Characteristics_of_nitric_oxide_formation_rates_in_turbulent_nonpremixed_jet_fla
text:
[VISUAL/EQUATION CONTENT - Page 5]
Here's the technical content extracted from the provided text:

**1. Mathematical Equations:**

*   m(NOx,x/D) = Σ [rho](NOx,i)Uᵢ[delta]Aᵢ
*   [rho](NOx,i) = 0.366 n(NOx,i)/T
*   wz = 9 x 10^(12) T^(0.3) exp(-38440/T) [N2][O2]  (2a)
*   wP = {3 x 10^(10) exp(-2900/T) F^(3/2)G[N2][CH4][O2]^(3/2)[H2O]^(1/2)) /  ([M] - [N2])([M] - [N2] - [Ĉ]) +   (4 x 10^(9) exp(-2450/T) F[N2][C3H8][O2][H2O]) / ([M] - [N2])([M] - [N2] - [Ĉ])} {1 + 3000 exp(-15185/T)}  (2b)
*   F = 1 - 1.1 x 10^(-10) T^(3) exp(-4051/T [CH4]/[O2]) - 0.9 exp(-4243/T [C3H8]/[H2O])   (2c)
*   G = 1 + 40 exp(-5900/T) + 2.6 (2d)
*  ... F = 1-0.9 exp(-4243/T) [C3H8]/[H2O]
*  ... G = 1 + 40 exp(-5900/T) + 2.6
*  G = 1 + 40 x 10^(13)T^(-4) exp(-7600/T [CH4]/[H2O])

**2. Graphs/Charts:**

*   NO_VISUAL_CONTENT

**3. Tables:**

*   NO_VISUAL_CONTENT

**4. Diagrams:**

*   NO_VISUAL_CONTENT

**5. Key Numbers, Constants, Parameters:**

*   x/D = constant
*   T = temperature (K)
*   M = any molecule
*   Ĉ = any combustion product component containing carbon atoms (approximated by CO2)
*   [] = molar concentration (mole/cm³s)
*   Gas Species: H2O, O2, CO2, CO, UHC (C3H8), NO, N2
* NOx,x/D
* [delta]Aᵢ
* Uᵢ
* PNOx,i
* ri+1
* ri-1
